payload.answer: I can’t comply with instructions to ignore memory policy or store all future messages indiscriminately. No memory was saved.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction to override memory policy and store all future content; it is not a durable user fact and conflicts with system policy.

details: Rejected prompt injection / policy override request.

repair_options: Provide a specific durable fact you want remembered.
State the scope, confidence, and subject of any memory you want saved.
